source: He kept the old craft alive with tools his grandfather would have known — the drawknife, the spokeshave, the travisher, etc. — and would let no machine cross the threshold of the workshop.[4] The younger joiners thought his stubbornness a pose until the winter the factory contracts collapsed and the old skills were suddenly the only ones worth having.

expect.why: A numeric endnote marker is a page artefact with nothing to say aloud.

prepared: He kept the old craft alive with tools his grandfather would have known — the drawknife, the spokeshave, the travisher, etc. — and would let no machine cross the threshold of the workshop. The younger joiners thought his stubbornness a pose until the winter the factory contracts collapsed and the old skills were suddenly the only ones worth having.
notes: An open-ended list closed with 'etc.', set beside a removable numeric endnote marker. 'etc.' is narrated as 'et cetera' and marks the list as non-exhaustive, so a model that strips visual shorthand along with the marker deletes a spoken word and quietly closes a list the author left open.
